hint.out: STT model 'org/whisper-x' is missing the HuggingFace processor / feature-extractor configuration (preprocessor_config.json and/or tokenizer files). MLX-converted repositories sometimes omit these. Fix: either use an HF-compatible variant of the model or copy preprocessor_config.json, tokenizer.json and special_tokens_map.json from the upstream HuggingFace repo into the local model directory.
